title: OpenCosmos Simera Extension
description: STAC OpenCosmos Simera Extension for Simera sensor processing metadata. Applied to items produced from the Simera payload.

oneOf.$comment: This is the schema for STAC Items.

opencosmos:session_id.title: Session ID
opencosmos:session_id.description: Unique identifier for the image acquisition session, generated by the payload.

opencosmos:simera:absolute_correction.title: Absolute Correction
opencosmos:simera:absolute_correction.description: Indicates whether absolute radiometric correction has been applied to the image.

opencosmos:simera:relative_correction.title: Relative Correction
opencosmos:simera:relative_correction.description: Indicates whether relative radiometric correction has been applied to the image.

opencosmos:simera:band_alignment_correct.title: Band Alignment Correction
opencosmos:simera:band_alignment_correct.description: Indicates whether band alignment correction has been applied to align spectral bands.

opencosmos:simera:geometric_correction.title: Geometric Correction
opencosmos:simera:geometric_correction.description: Indicates whether geometric correction has been applied to the image.

opencosmos:simera:orthorectification.title: Orthorectification
opencosmos:simera:orthorectification.description: Indicates whether orthorectification has been applied to remove terrain distortions.

opencosmos:simera:real_gcps_used.title: Real GCPs Used
opencosmos:simera:real_gcps_used.description: Indicates whether real Ground Control Points (GCPs) were used for georeferencing.

opencosmos:simera:compression.title: Compression
opencosmos:simera:compression.description: Compression setting used during image acquisition. 0 indicates no compression.

opencosmos:simera:capture_mode.title: Capture Mode
opencosmos:simera:capture_mode.description: Acquisition mode used by the Simera payload.
